label: Player
title: Player
lead: Reference for the vanilla Body player fields you will usually read or modify from mods, plus a few CUCoreLib helpers for accessing them safely.
bodyHtml:
The player object

The live player object is the vanilla Body component. Most player values you inspect or change from mods live on PlayerCamera.main.body.

Body body = PlayerCamera.main.body;
float hunger = body.hunger;
Vector3 position = body.transform.position;

This page is intentionally a reference page. Field names come from the decompiled vanilla Body.cs, so these are the names to search for in dnSpyEx or patch against in your own code.

Player field reference

FieldTypeDescription
limbsLimb[]All player limbs. Use for limb-specific wounds, treatment, and temperature work.
legLimbsLimb[]Leg-only limb subset used by movement checks.
baseLimbLimbBase/root limb reference for the body.
bodyAnimatorAnimatorMain body animator.
idleClipAnimationClipIdle animation clip reference.
armsAnimatorAnimatorAnimator for the arms layer.
rbRigidbody2DPlayer rigidbody used for physics and movement.
standingboolWhether the player is standing.
colBoxCollider2DMain player collider reference.
isRightboolFacing/orientation flag used by look and animation logic.
maxSpeedfloatMovement speed cap.
targetLookPosVector3World position the player is looking toward.
staminaStrengthAnimationCurveCurve used for stamina-related scaling.
vomiterVomiterVomiting behavior component.
idleTimefloatHow long the body has been idle.
interactionRangeconst floatVanilla interaction distance limit.
stimulantMultiplierfloatMultiplier affecting stimulant movement/response behavior.
jumpSpeedfloatJump velocity/speed.
temporarySlowdownfloatTemporary movement penalty.
groundedboolWhether the player is on the ground.
moveDirVector2Current movement input direction.
moveForcefloatBase movement force/acceleration.
liquidSlipTimefloatHow long liquid slip effects remain active.
liquidRagdollBarfloatSlip/ragdoll buildup related to liquids.
slowdownAmountfloatCurrent total slowdown strength.
lastTimeStepVelocityVector2Most recent physics-step velocity.
wallSlideSlowdownfloatWall-slide movement reduction.
timeSlidforfloatHow long wall sliding has been happening.
bloodOxygenfloatCurrent oxygenation value.
bloodVolumefloatCurrent blood amount. Important for bleeding, shock, and survival logic.
heartRatefloatCurrent heart rate.
respiratoryRatefloatCurrent breathing rate.
bloodPressurefloatCurrent blood pressure value.
bloodVesselSizefloatVasoconstriction/vasodilation style multiplier.
fibrillationProgressfloatProgress toward or through fibrillation.
fibrillationForcedboolWhether fibrillation is being forced.
bloodViscosityfloatBlood thickness/viscosity value.
heartRatePressureOffsetfloatInternal blood-pressure offset tied to heart rate.
bloodPressureReadoutstringFormatted blood pressure display string.
adrenalinefloatStored adrenaline amount.
curAdrenalinefloatCurrent live adrenaline effect strength.
happinessfloatGeneral mood/happiness stat.
opiateHappinessfloatOpiate-derived happiness contribution.
antidepressantHappinessfloatAntidepressant-derived happiness contribution.
weightOffsetfloatExtra body weight offset often changed by food or liquid effects.
hungerfloatCurrent hunger meter.
thirstfloatCurrent thirst meter.
staminafloatCurrent stamina amount.
energyfloatCurrent energy/fatigue reserve.
brainHealthfloatBrain health value.
consciousnessfloatWakefulness/consciousness level.
shockfloatGeneral shock value.
sleepingboolWhether the body is currently sleeping.
temperaturefloatCore body temperature.
clothingTemperaturefloatTemperature contribution from worn clothing.
averagePainfloatAggregate pain across the body.
totalBleedSpeedfloatTotal bleed rate from all wounds.
slotsInventorySlot[]Player inventory and equipment slots.
breathingboolWhether the body is currently breathing.
eatTimefloatTimer/state related to eating actions.
attackCooldownfloatAttack delay/cooldown timer.
crouchAmountfloatBlend amount for crouching.
crouchingboolWhether the player is crouching.
sicknessAmountfloatGeneral sickness or poison meter.
talkerTalkerSpeech/talker component for reactions and barks.
eyeCloseTimefloatEye closing animation timer.
eyeScareTimefloatScare eye animation timer.
eyePanicTimefloatPanic eye animation timer.
weightMovementCurveAnimationCurveMovement scaling from carried/body weight.
temperatureMovementCurveAnimationCurveMovement scaling from temperature.
foodMovementCurveAnimationCurveMovement scaling from hunger/food state.
consciousnessRiseRatestatic floatVanilla rate constant for regaining consciousness.
consciousnessFallRatestatic floatVanilla rate constant for losing consciousness.
desensitizedMultfloatMultiplier for desensitization effects.
corpsesSeenintCounter used for corpse-related mental effects.
soundCooldownfloatCooldown for sound-producing actions.
bonusRotfloatExtra body rotation offset.
accelRotfloatRotation caused by acceleration/movement.
attackRotfloatRotation added by attacks.
septicShockfloatSeptic shock severity.
harmerSelfHarmerSelf-harm related component/reference.
disfiguredboolWhether the body is marked as disfigured.
eyeGoneboolWhether one eye is gone.
bothEyesGoneboolWhether both eyes are gone.
visualBodyOffsetVector2Visual offset for the rendered body.
overrideLookTimefloatDuration for a forced look override.
overrideLookPosVector2Forced look target position.
charTypeintCharacter/body type selector.
armOffsetfloatArm visual offset.
wallSlideParticleParticleSystemParticle effect used while wall sliding.
standLerpTimefloatStand transition lerp timer.
totalEncumberancefloatTotal carried weight burden.
overEncumberancefloatHow far over the encumbrance limit the player is.
limpAnimatorSpeedfloatAnimator speed modifier for limping.
radiationSicknessfloatRadiation sickness amount.
maxEncumberancefloatMaximum normal encumbrance before penalties.
fallShakeCooldownfloatCooldown for fall/camera shake effects.
caffeinatedfloatCaffeine effect strength.
handSlotintCurrently active hand slot index.
hearingLossfloatCurrent hearing loss severity.
internalBleedingfloatInternal bleeding amount.
hemothoraxfloatBlood/fluid in the chest severity.
forceWalkboolWhether movement is forced into walk mode.
painShockfloatPain-induced shock amount.
limbBloodUpdateTimerfloatTimer for limb blood updates.
traumaAmountfloatGeneral trauma severity.
hungerLimbHealAnimationCurveCurve controlling healing relative to hunger.
overdoseIndexintRuntime overdose tracking index.
impactSmallAudioClip[]Small impact sounds.
impactMediumAudioClip[]Medium impact sounds.
impactLargeAudioClip[]Large impact sounds.
reversedControlsboolWhether controls are currently reversed.
furColorsGradientGradient used for fur coloration.
endedJumpboolWhether the current jump has ended.
depressionChanceCurveAnimationCurveCurve tied to depression-style chance/effect logic.
wetnessfloatHow wet the player is.
specialCryingboolSpecial crying state toggle.
inWaterboolWhether the body is currently in water.
liquidDrinkTimefloatTimer/state for liquid drinking.
bodyAffectLiquidAffectActive body-wide liquid effect reference.
dogShakeIntensityfloatShake intensity for wet shake behavior.
brainShakeIntensityfloatShake caused by brain effects.
miscShakeIntensityfloatCatch-all extra shake intensity.
hasScubaGearboolWhether the player is treated as having scuba gear.
mindWipeMindwipeScriptMindwipe effect component/reference.
curSleepSleepQualityCurrent sleep quality enum.
badSleepAmountfloatAccumulated poor sleep amount.
goodSleepTimefloatAccumulated good sleep time.
snowAmountfloatSnow buildup on the player.
immunityfloatImmune system strength value.
immunityInfectionSpeedAnimationCurveCurve affecting infection speed from immunity.
antibioticImmunityTimefloatRemaining boosted-immunity time from antibiotics.
curImmunityMultfloatCurrent immunity multiplier.
tailTransformTail transform reference, when present.
lastHappinessfloat[]Recent happiness history buffer.
triedRollingLastStandboolWhether the game already tried a last-stand roll.
succesfullyRolledLastStandboolWhether the last-stand roll succeeded.
lastLastChanceHappinessAnimationCurveCurve involved in last-stand happiness logic.
lastStandTimefloatTime spent in or around last-stand state.
dirtynessfloatDirtiness amount.
brainGrowSicknessfloatBrain-growth sickness amount.
usedNeuralBoosterboolWhether a neural booster has already been used.
forcedSleepQualitySleepQuality?Optional forced sleep quality override.
clawDamageCurveAnimationCurveCurve used for claw damage scaling.
clawHealthfloatCurrent claw health.
clawRegrowTimefloatTime for claw regrowth.
heartProgfloatHeart cycle progression value.
randomFibrillationVariationfloatExtra randomness applied to fibrillation behavior.
tempDiffFromNormalfloatDifference from normal body temperature.
skillsSkillsPlayer skill/stat container.
currentClimbableClimbableCurrent climbable object reference.
climbableProgressfloatProgress through the current climb action.
climbVelocityfloatCurrent climb movement speed.
onHardStimulantsboolWhether hard stimulant effects are active.
usingSleepingBagboolWhether the player is currently using a sleeping bag.
heartCurveNormalAnimationCurveHeart rhythm curve for normal state.
heartCurveArrythmiaAnimationCurveHeart rhythm curve for arrhythmia state.
defibShockedFramesintShort runtime counter for recent defib shock frames.
thirstBloodPressureCurveAnimationCurveCurve connecting thirst state to blood pressure changes.
hasPulmonaryEmbolismboolWhether pulmonary embolism is active.
strokeAmountfloatStroke severity amount.
